'''Pink Conch''' was a transportation business that specialized in providing transportation by [[Submarine/Legends|submersible]]. The company was based on [[Pavo Prime/Legends|Pavo Prime]] and only used very spacious transports.

==Appearances==
*{{InsiderCite|67|The Trouble with Squibs|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
